tavily.answer: In 2025, internal displacements caused by conflict or violence reached a record high, surpassing those caused by natural disasters for the first time, according to a report by the Internal Displacement Monitoring Centre. In Iraq, security developments include an explosive drone targeting an Iranian Kurdish opposition camp north of Erbil, with no casualties reported as the camp had been recently evacuated. Saudi warplanes also reportedly struck militias in Iraq during the Iran war, while retaliatory strikes were launched from Kuwait into Iraq. Additionally, Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi visited Iraq amid rumors of a raid on the Baghdad Green Zone, highlighting ongoing tensions and the influence of Iranian-backed militias in the region.
